notableEvents.label: Ian Happ GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd. Ian Happ out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ steals (4) 2nd base. Michael Busch steals (2) home.
